I had to purchase new AirPods
I ruined my AirPods Pro 2's microphones and ear detection with blue tack

"Blu Tack is a reusable putty-like pressure-sensitive adhesive produced by Bostik, commonly used to attach lightweight objects (such as posters or sheets of paper) to walls, doors or other dry surfaces."

cyber punk anime almost made me cry tbh
I initially started off focused entirely on stealth, and then the moment the Mantis Blades arms augment became available I [might] have completely changed my playstyle :D
looks at the amount of people I've quite literally sliced apart over my playthrough
It gets rid of the friend/foe indicators completely
DONT REMIND ME OF BERSERK SAD MOMENTS IN EDGERUNNERS
But yeah, the Beserk augment in-game is fun >:D
all I will say is once you watch it you will play the game differently
12 seconds of complete invulnerability, during which you have absolutely no indication of who is a friend, a foe, or an innocent bystander
watch it whenever you can I swear life changing
going through the whole of the [Phantom Liberty] DLC without a cyberdeck because I swapped it out for the iconic Beserk I got for completing the game lol
there are Easter egg to the anime
Without a Cyberdeck, you can't hack things. And stealth becomes almost impossible without hacking
So uh, I didn't do stealth lmao
Just ripped apart everyone I saw with the Mantis Blades
It is always fun to end combat, turn around, and someone's severed head is staring back at you
OMG 7 FREE MEOWS HOLY GRAIL OF VALUE

vsync makes the game send frames when the monitor is ready, avoiding tearing
(I also had to tell a streamer to turn on vsync once because the game they were playing was causing their GPU to be unable to handle streaming. Turned out it was running at fucking 1.3k fps)
Yeah, it was eating all of the GPU resources some-fucking-how
